creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=22755 for a detailed
description of the problem, and why this is being fixed in ports.

Fix: Add the following patch to the patches for the shell/bash2 port. That
at least fixes the problem for bash2. I'm assuming alfred won't mind
helping users of others shells fix theirs, as he advocates this
solution.
How-To-Repeat: 
See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=22755 for a detailed
description of the problem, and why this is being fixed in ports.
